testcase.name: test_page_check_ai_voice_library_heading_visibility

failure.message: playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Locator.click: Timeout 30000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for get_by_role("menuitem", name="AI Voice Library").first

E Call log: E - waiting for get_by_role("menuitem", name="AI Voice Library").first

testcase.name: test_TC_Navigation_02

failure.message: AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('/enterprise')' Actual value: https://www.jellypod.com/pricing Call log: - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms 3 × unexpected value "https://www.jellypod.com/" 6 × unexpected value "https://www.jellypod.com/pricing"

testcase.failure: tests/page_1_cdbd/test_page_1_cdbd.py:25: in test_TC_Navigation_02 expect(page).to_have_url(re.compile(r"/enterprise")) E AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('/enterprise')' E Actual value: https://www.jellypod.com/pricing E Call log: E - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms E 3 × unexpected value "https://www.jellypod.com/" E 6 × unexpected value "https://www.jellypod.com/pricing"

failure.message: AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible Actual value: None Error: strict mode violation: locator("//a[contains(text(), \"Pricing\")]") resolved to 2 elements: 1) Pricing aka locator("footer").get_by_role("link", name="Pricing") Call log: - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 15000ms - waiting for locator("//a[contains(text(), \"Pricing\")]")

failure.message: AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('/signup')' Actual value: https://login.jellypod.com/sign-up?client_id=client_01K4VN6KHJECJDHRVF0QV2F4PM&redirect_uri=https%3A%2F%2Fjellypod.com%2Fauth%2Fcallback&authorization_session_id=01KJVSS5SBTHB7XT96SY6SEZB8 Call log: - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms 2 × unexpected value "https://www.jellypod.com/contact" - waiting for" https://www.jellypod.com/signup" navigation to finish... - navigated to "https://login.jellypod.com/sign-up?client_id=client_01K4VN6KHJECJDHRVF0QV2F4PM&redirect_uri=https%3A%2F%2Fjellypod.com%2Fauth%2Fcallback&authorization_session_id=01KJVSS5SBTHB7XT96SY6SEZB8" 6 × unexpected value "https://login.jellypod.com/sign-up?client_id=client_01K4VN6KHJECJDHRVF0QV2F4PM&redirect_uri=https%3A%2F%2Fjellypod.com%2Fauth%2Fcallback&authorization_session_id=01KJVSS5SBTHB7XT96SY6SEZB8"

testcase.name: test_TC_Interaction_05

failure.message: AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible Actual value: None Error: element(s) not found Call log: - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 15000ms - waiting for locator("//*[@data-testid=\"consent-manager-widget-footer-save-button\"]").first

testcase.failure: tests/page_5_aa33/test_page_5_aa33.py:80: in test_TC_Interaction_05 expect(page.locator('xpath=//*[@data-testid="consent-manager-widget-footer-save-button"]').first).to_be_visible(timeout=15000) E AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible E Actual value: None E Error: element(s) not found E Call log: E - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 15000ms E - waiting for locator("//*[@data-testid=\"consent-manager-widget-footer-save-button\"]").first
